items.how_used: 对八个用水类别分别建立线性回归曲线，基于USGS历史数据拟合趋势，用于预测2025年用水需求。
items.source_excerpt: We created regression curves of the data given by the USGS for each of the eight categories.

items.source_excerpt: We then summed up the projected 2025 fresh water usage from each of the eight categories to obtain a total fresh water usage graph.

items.how_used: 将各子模型的水节约量和成本加权求和，得到总水节约量和总成本。

items.source_excerpt: Each individual plan is modeled by a sub-model and at the end, their costs and water savings are summed to create the total water saved and the total cost of our national water strategy.
